sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n28384" key="drhsmosu/nh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δρησμοσύνη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n28384.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">δρηστοσύνη, δ. ἱερῶν</ref> </xr> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">care</tr_> of the holy rites, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0013.tlg002.perseus-grc1:476" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">h.Cer.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">476</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n28384.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">δρασμός</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1487.tlg001:351" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">351</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
